user_intent: There are 3 boxes, one labeled apples, one labeled oranges, one labeled oranges and apples. You can take one fruit out of one box to decide what label goes on each box. Which box do you take a fruit out of.

final_storm.prompt:
CONTEXT:


USER: There are 3 boxes, one labeled apples, one labeled oranges, one labeled oranges and apples. You can take one fruit out of one box to decide what label goes on each box. Which box do you take a fruit out of.

trajectories.text:
This is a classic riddle! The answer is: **You take a fruit out of the box labeled "apples and oranges"**.

Here’s why:

*   If you take an apple, the box labeled "oranges" *must* contain the apples.
*   If you take an orange, the box labeled "apples" *must* contain the oranges.
